texto: Cutting libraries during a recession is like cutting hospitals during a plague.
autor: Eleanor Crumblehulme library assistant University of British Columbia
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Eleanor Crumblehulme library assistant University of British Columbia: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Cutting libraries during a recession is like cutting hospitals during a plague.” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, libraries, cutting pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
